name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
StateSpace == [i \in 1..N |-> state[i] \in {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
        /\ N > 0
        /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = idle

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = \*]
          /\ turn' = \*  \* turn may change arbitrarily

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; 0 means free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = 0
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks[i] = i
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = i
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N) + 1] = 0]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N :
                forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N :
                forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0 \/ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = i

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' THEN num ELSE num' + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag THEN flag ELSE flag' + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxFlag' THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF maxFlag THEN maxFlag ELSE maxFlag' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures that q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, and count is an integer in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K, with head and tail indices indicating the positions for dequeue and enqueue, respectively. *)
Init == 
  /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> 0]
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ count = 0

(* The producer action enqueues an item when the queue is not full. *)
Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* The consumer action dequeues an item when the queue is not empty. *)
Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next action is either Producer or Consumer. *)
Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> 
      /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
      \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
      \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, markerSent, markerReceived, finished
P == 1..N

\* The set of channels
Channels == << [p \in P, q \in P |-> channel[p][q] ]>>

\* The set of markers sent
MarkersSent == << [p \in P, q \in P |-> markerSent[p][q] ]>>

\* The set of markers received
MarkersReceived == << [p \in P, q \in P |-> markerReceived[p][q] ]>>

\* The set of finished processes
Finished == << [p \in P |-> finished[p] ]>>

\* The set of snapshots
Snapshots == << [p \in P |-> snapshot[p] ]>>

\* The set of local states
States == << [p \in P |-> state[p] ]>>

\* The set of channel states
ChannelStates == << [p \in P, q \in P |-> channel[p][q] ]>>

\* The set of all variables
vars == << state, channel, snapshot, markerSent, markerReceived, finished >>

Init == /\ state \in [P -> Nat]
       /\ channel \in [P, P -> [Seq of Nat]]
       /\ snapshot \in [P -> [Seq of Nat]]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> -> SubSeq(file, i, Min(i+CHUNK_SIZE-1, Len(file)))]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..Len(chunks))
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin {j \in 1..Len(chunks) : channel[j] = i}
        /\ \E j \in 1..Len(chunks) :
            /\ channel[j] = i
            /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
                /\ loss
                /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![j] = i]
                /\ retransmit_count' = [retransmit_count EXCEPT ![j] = Min(retransmit_count[j] + 1, MAX_RETRIES)]
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
        \/ \E j \in 1..Len(chunks) :
            /\ channel[j] = i
            /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
                /\ \Not loss
                /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![j] = i]
                /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, chunks[i])
                /\ retransmit_count' = [retransmit_count EXCEPT ![j] = Min(retransmit_count[j] + 1, MAX_RETRIES)]

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>
